mastery_check.prompt_to_student: Write a comprehensive paragraph demonstrating mastery of verb tenses and aspects covered in The Time Matrix pathway.
mastery_check.ai_grading_rubric: Evaluate the student's paragraph for correct usage of multiple tenses including present simple, present continuous, past tenses, perfect aspects, and passive voice. The paragraph should demonstrate sophisticated control of time relationships and academic writing style. Pass threshold: 80%.
